YunUIProvider.name: adapters
YunUIProvider.description: Partial overrides; unspecified adapters fall back to defaults.

CapabilitySelector.name: disabled
CapabilitySelector.description: Disable interaction and dim the control.

CapabilitySelector.name: modelType
CapabilitySelector.description: Filters which capability set is shown (e.g. "image_generation", "audio", "video"). Defaults to the LLM set.

CapabilitySelector.name: onChange
CapabilitySelector.description: Called with the next selection when a capability is toggled.

Footer.name: appName
Footer.description: Brand name shown next to the logo.

Footer.name: social
Footer.description: Social/icon links shown in the bottom bar.

Footer.name: tagline
Footer.description: Short brand tagline under the logo.

LanguageSwitcher.name: locales
LanguageSwitcher.description: Available languages. The host app supplies these.

LanguageSwitcher.name: onChange
LanguageSwitcher.description: Called when the user picks a different locale. Host owns cookie/reload.

LanguageSwitcher.name: pending
LanguageSwitcher.description: Disables the control while a change is in flight.

ModelCard.name: description
ModelCard.description: Short description (falls back to a "No description" label).

ModelCard.name: developer
ModelCard.description: Developer/maker shown in the footer, with an optional icon.

ModelCard.name: icon
ModelCard.description: Avatar slot — host renders the provider/model icon.

ModelCard.name: ids
ModelCard.description: Primary id + aliases, shown as mono badges.

ModelCard.name: labels
ModelCard.type: { nonofficial?: string; suspended?: string; noDescription?: string | undefined; } | undefined
ModelCard.description: Localized strings for the unofficial/suspended badges and the empty-description fallback.

ModelCard.name: nonofficial
ModelCard.description: Mark the model as unofficial (shows a warning badge).

ModelCard.name: onClick
ModelCard.description: Makes the whole card a clickable button (keyboard-activatable).

ModelCard.name: suspended
ModelCard.description: Mark the model as suspended (shows a paused badge).

ModelCard.name: tier
ModelCard.description: Optional tier chip (e.g. "pro"); a `"free"` tier is hidden.

Navbar.name: appName
Navbar.description: Brand name shown next to the logo.

Navbar.name: currentPath
Navbar.description: Current route, used for active-link + scroll-spy.

Navbar.name: labels
Navbar.type: { signIn?: string; signUp?: string; menu?: string | undefined; } | undefined

Navbar.name: languageSwitcher
Navbar.description: Right-side control slots; the host injects the configured switcher.

Navbar.name: links
Navbar.description: Center navigation links. The host builds these from branding/flags/i18n.

ProviderIcon.name: iconUrl
ProviderIcon.description: Custom icon URL that overrides the built-in lookup (falls back on load error).

ProviderIcon.name: provider
ProviderIcon.description: Provider id; resolved to a built-in icon by name (e.g. "openai", "anthropic").

ProviderIcon.name: rounded
ProviderIcon.description: Render as a rounded avatar tile with a subtle background.

ModelIcon.name: developer
ModelIcon.description: Developer/maker id, used to resolve a developer icon (second priority).

ModelIcon.name: iconUrl
ModelIcon.description: Model's own icon URL or `/icons/models/` filename (highest priority).

ModelIcon.name: provider
ModelIcon.description: Provider id, used as the final fallback icon.

ModelIcon.name: rounded
ModelIcon.description: Render as a rounded avatar tile with a subtle background.

ModelAvatar.name: iconUrl
ModelAvatar.description: Model's own icon URL or filename (highest priority).

ThinkingBlock.name: renderContent
ThinkingBlock.description:
Render the reasoning content (e.g. with a Markdown renderer). Defaults to
plain pre-wrapped text so YunUI carries no markdown dependency.

AccountLockedCard.name: onMount
AccountLockedCard.description:
Run once on mount. Yunxin uses this to drop the (now-useless) session via
api.logout() so background auth probes can't bounce the user back into a
loop on these terminal screens.

BlogCard.name: author
BlogCard.type: { name?: string; avatar?: string; url?: string | undefined; } | undefined
BlogCard.description: Post author (name shown in the meta row).

BlogCard.name: category
BlogCard.description: Category label shown as an info badge.

BlogCard.name: coverImage
BlogCard.description: Cover image URL; a placeholder icon is shown when absent.

BlogCard.name: locale
BlogCard.description: Locale for the date; defaults to a stable "en-US" (SSR-safe).

BlogCard.name: tags
BlogCard.description: Tag list (first 3 rendered as clickable chips).

BlogPagination.name: onPageChange
BlogPagination.description: Navigate to a page. The host app owns routing / query-string updates.

BlogPostHeader.name: author
BlogPostHeader.type: { name?: string; avatar?: string; url?: string | undefined; } | undefined

CategoryFilter.name: allLabel
CategoryFilter.description: Localized label for the "all posts" button; defaults to English.

CategoryFilter.name: onSelect
CategoryFilter.description: Called with the chosen category, or null for "all". Host owns routing.

CodeBlock.name: code
CodeBlock.description: The code to display (ignored when `tabs` are provided).

CodeBlock.name: filename
CodeBlock.description: Filename shown in the header instead of the language badge.

CodeBlock.name: language
CodeBlock.description: Language label, also used by the lightweight highlighter.

CodeBlock.name: showLineNumbers
CodeBlock.description: Show line numbers in the gutter.

CodeBlock.name: tabs
CodeBlock.description: Render multiple switchable code tabs instead of a single `code` block.

ErrorBoundary.name: onError
ErrorBoundary.description: Notified when an error is caught (e.g. for logging).

FAQ.name: defaultOpenIndex
FAQ.description: Which item starts expanded (default: first). Pass null for all collapsed.

FAQ.name: items
FAQ.description: The questions to render. The host app supplies (and translates) these.

FellowsBanner.name: features
FellowsBanner.description: Pre-resolved feature labels, rendered as a "·"-joined list.

MediaPageHeader.name: isSyncing
MediaPageHeader.description: While true, the sync button spins and is disabled.

MediaPageHeader.name: onSync
MediaPageHeader.description: Called when the sync button is clicked.

MediaPageHeader.name: stats
MediaPageHeader.description: Optional inline stat chips (`label` + `value`) below the header.

MediaPageHeader.name: syncError
MediaPageHeader.description: Sync error message; shown in a red banner when non-null.

MediaEmptyState.name: action
MediaEmptyState.description: Action slot (e.g. a button) below the text.

MediaEmptyState.name: icon
MediaEmptyState.description: Icon component shown above the title.

PageLoadingState.name: message
PageLoadingState.description: Optional text shown beside the spinner.

PageErrorState.name: onRetry
PageErrorState.description: When provided, shows a retry link that calls this.

PageEmptyState.name: action
PageEmptyState.description: Action slot (e.g. a button) below the text.

PageEmptyState.name: icon
PageEmptyState.description: Optional icon component shown above the title.

Sidebar.name: appName
Sidebar.description: Brand name shown next to the logo.

Sidebar.name: closeLabel
Sidebar.description: Accessible label for the close/collapse buttons.

Sidebar.name: collapsed
Sidebar.description: Desktop collapse state (hides the sidebar off-canvas).

Sidebar.name: currentPath
Sidebar.description: Used to compute the active item.

Sidebar.name: footer
Sidebar.description: Bottom-pinned slot (balance card, user card, etc.).

Sidebar.name: loading
Sidebar.description: While true, the nav (and footer slot) render shimmer skeletons.

Sidebar.name: onClose
Sidebar.description: Called to close the mobile drawer.

Sidebar.name: onNavigate
Sidebar.description:
Called when a nav item is clicked. When provided, default link navigation
is prevented and the host owns routing (useful in SPAs / demos). When
omitted, items navigate via the injected Link adapter.

Sidebar.name: onToggleCollapse
Sidebar.description: Called to toggle the desktop collapse state (also renders the collapse button when set).

Sidebar.name: scrollStorageKey
Sidebar.description: sessionStorage key for persisting nav scroll position across navigations.

StatCard.name: icon
StatCard.description: Optional leading icon component (e.g. a Lucide icon).

StatCard.name: inline
StatCard.description: Compact layout: icon + label on one row, value below (admin insights style).

StatCard.name: subtext
StatCard.description: Optional supporting line under the value.

StatCard.name: tone
StatCard.description: Semantic color tint for the card + value (amber/emerald/blue/red/purple).

StatCard.name: trend
StatCard.description: Optional trend indicator: percent `value` plus whether it's `positive` (up/green) or down/red.

StatCard.name: value
StatCard.description: The metric value (string, number, or node).

StatCard.name: valueFirst
StatCard.description: Value-first layout: big number on top, label beneath (analytics / admin stats style).

AnimatedNumber.name: decimals
AnimatedNumber.description: Decimal places; trailing zeros are stripped (100.00 → 100).

BentoCard.name: header
BentoCard.description: Top media/visual slot above the icon and text.

Checkbox.name: disabled
Checkbox.description: Disable interaction and dim the control.

Checkbox.name: id
Checkbox.description: Element id (e.g. to pair with a `<label htmlFor>`).

Checkbox.name: onCheckedChange
Checkbox.description: Called with the next checked state when toggled.

Combobox.name: allowCustom
Combobox.description: Allow entering a value not in `options` (creatable).

Combobox.name: creatableText
Combobox.description: Label template for the "create new" row; `{value}` is replaced with the typed text.

Combobox.name: disabled
Combobox.description: Disable interaction and dim the control.

Combobox.name: onChange
Combobox.description: Called with the chosen (or newly created) value.

Combobox.name: placeholder
Combobox.description: Placeholder for the input (falls back to i18n default).

ConfirmModal.name: variant
ConfirmModal.description: Variant affects icon and button colors

CustomSelect.name: disabled
CustomSelect.description: Disable interaction and dim the control.

CustomSelect.name: onChange
CustomSelect.description: Called with the chosen option's value.

CustomSelect.name: placeholder
CustomSelect.description: Placeholder shown when nothing is selected (falls back to i18n default).

CustomSelect.name: searchable
CustomSelect.description: Show an in-dropdown search box that filters options by label/value.

Separator.name: decorative
Separator.description: Purely decorative — no semantic role announced to assistive tech.

Alert.name: icon
Alert.description: Leading icon. Defaults to a variant-appropriate icon; pass `null` to hide.

Alert.name: title
Alert.description: Optional bold title above the body.

Tag.name: onRemove
Tag.description: Show a remove (×) button and call this when it's pressed.

Tag.name: removeLabel
Tag.description: Accessible label for the remove button (English default).

StatusIndicator.name: pulse
StatusIndicator.description: Add a pulsing halo to signal "live".

Steps.name: current
Steps.description: Zero-based index of the active step; earlier steps render as completed.

AvatarGroup.name: max
AvatarGroup.description: Cap how many avatars render; the remainder collapse into a "+N" chip.

PageLoader.name: subtitle
PageLoader.description: Secondary, lighter message under the title.

PageLoader.name: title
PageLoader.description: Primary loading message shown under the spinner.

EmptyState.name: action
EmptyState.description: Action slot (e.g. a primary button) below the text.

Modal.name: isClosing
Modal.description: Whether modal is in closing animation state

Modal.name: onBackdropClick
Modal.description: Called when backdrop is clicked (defaults to onClose)

Modal.name: showCloseButton
Modal.description: Whether to show the close button

Modal.name: showUnsavedBadge
Modal.description: Whether to show unsaved changes badge

Sheet.name: onClose
Sheet.description: Called when the sheet should close (backdrop click, escape, close button).

Button.name: asChild
Button.description: Render the single child element with the button styling instead of a <button> (e.g. wrap a <Link>).

Button.name: loading
Button.description: Show a spinner before the children and disable the button while busy.

Input.name: error
Input.description: Error message shown below the field; also switches the border to a red error style.

Input.name: icon
Input.description: Leading icon rendered inside the field on the left.

Textarea.name: error
Textarea.description: Error message shown below the field; also switches the border to a red error style.

PasswordInput.name: error
PasswordInput.description: Error message shown below the field; also switches the border to a red error style.

PasswordInput.name: labels
PasswordInput.description: Accessible labels for the reveal toggle (English defaults).

NumberInput.name: error
NumberInput.description: Error message shown below the field; also switches the border to a red error style.

NumberInput.name: labels
NumberInput.description: Accessible labels for the steppers (English defaults).

NumberInput.name: onChange
NumberInput.description: Called with the next clamped value.

SearchInput.name: clearable
SearchInput.description: Show a clear (×) button while there's a value.

SearchInput.name: clearLabel
SearchInput.description: Accessible label for the clear button (English default).

SearchInput.name: onChange
SearchInput.description: Called with the new query string — also called with `""` when cleared.

Card.name: hover
Card.description: Add a hover lift (border + shadow transition).

MotionDiv.name: aria-relevant
MotionDiv.type: "text" | "additions" | "additions removals" | "additions text" | "all" | "removals" | "removals additions" | "removals text" | "text additions" | "text removals"

MotionSpan.name: aria-relevant
MotionSpan.type: "text" | "additions" | "additions removals" | "additions text" | "all" | "removals" | "removals additions" | "removals text" | "text additions" | "text removals"

IconButton.name: icon
IconButton.description: The icon to render inside the button.

IconButton.name: label
IconButton.description: Accessible label, also shown as the hover tooltip.

DropdownMenuItem.name: inset
DropdownMenuItem.description: Indent to align with checkbox/radio items.

DropdownMenuLabel.name: inset
DropdownMenuLabel.description: Indent to align with checkbox/radio items.

Flex.name: gap
Flex.description: Gap between children, on the spacing scale.

Flex.name: padding
Flex.description: Padding on all sides, on the spacing scale.

Flex.name: px
Flex.description: Horizontal padding (`px`), on the spacing scale.

Flex.name: py
Flex.description: Vertical padding (`py`), on the spacing scale.

Flex.name: wrap
Flex.description: Allow children to wrap onto multiple lines.

Grid.name: align
Grid.description: Cross-axis alignment of items within their cells (`align-items`).

Grid.name: gap
Grid.description: Gap between cells, on the spacing scale.

Grid.name: padding
Grid.description: Padding on all sides, on the spacing scale.

Column.name: gap
Column.description: Gap between children, on the spacing scale.

Column.name: padding
Column.description: Padding on all sides, on the spacing scale.

Column.name: px
Column.description: Horizontal padding (`px`), on the spacing scale.

Column.name: py
Column.description: Vertical padding (`py`), on the spacing scale.

Column.name: wrap
Column.description: Allow children to wrap onto multiple lines.

Row.name: gap
Row.description: Gap between children, on the spacing scale.

Row.name: padding
Row.description: Padding on all sides, on the spacing scale.

Row.name: px
Row.description: Horizontal padding (`px`), on the spacing scale.

Row.name: py
Row.description: Vertical padding (`py`), on the spacing scale.

Row.name: wrap
Row.description: Allow children to wrap onto multiple lines.

Stack.name: gap
Stack.description: Gap between children, on the spacing scale.

Stack.name: padding
Stack.description: Padding on all sides, on the spacing scale.

Stack.name: px
Stack.description: Horizontal padding (`px`), on the spacing scale.

Stack.name: py
Stack.description: Vertical padding (`py`), on the spacing scale.

Stack.name: wrap
Stack.description: Allow children to wrap onto multiple lines.

Table.name: containerClassName
Table.description: Class applied to the outer scroll/overflow wrapper.

Pagination.name: ariaLabel
Pagination.description: Accessible name for the wrapping nav landmark.

Pagination.name: nextLabel
Pagination.description: Accessible label for the next-page button.

Pagination.name: onPageChange
Pagination.description: Called with the requested page when a control is activated.

Pagination.name: previousLabel
Pagination.description: Accessible label for the previous-page button.

Pagination.name: siblingCount
Pagination.description:
How many page buttons to show on each side of the current page before
collapsing into an ellipsis.

Marquee.name: repeat
Marquee.description: How many times to repeat the children to fill the loop.

ConfirmCloseDialog.name: onDiscard
ConfirmCloseDialog.description: Called when user chooses to discard changes

ConfirmCloseDialog.name: onKeepEditing
ConfirmCloseDialog.description: Called when user chooses to keep editing

NavTabs.name: activeKey
NavTabs.description: Key of the currently active tab.

NavTabs.name: onChange
NavTabs.description: Called for button-mode (in-page) tabs. Ignored when tabs use `href`.

SegmentedSelect.name: disabled
SegmentedSelect.description: Disable interaction and dim the control.

SegmentedSelect.name: onChange
SegmentedSelect.description: Called with the chosen segment's value.

ShinyButton.name: href
ShinyButton.description: When set, renders as a routing Link to this destination instead of a button.

Switch.name: disabled
Switch.description: Disable interaction and dim the control.

Switch.name: id
Switch.description: Element id (e.g. to pair with a `<label htmlFor>`).

Switch.name: onCheckedChange
Switch.description: Called with the next checked state when toggled.
